song.title: Sweet Feast of Love Divine
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Sweet feast of love divine! ’Tis grace that makes us free To feed upon this bread and wine, In mem’ry, Lord, of Thee.
[V2] 2) Here every welcome guest Waits, Lord, from Thee to learn The secrets of Thy Father’s breast, And all Thy grace discern.
[V3] 3) Here conscience ends its strife, And faith delights to prove The sweetness of the Bread of Life, The fulness of Thy love.
[V4] 4) That blood that flowed for sin In symbol here we see, And feel the blessed pledge within That we are loved of Thee.
[V5] 5) But if this glimpse of love Is so divinely sweet, What will it be, O Lord, above, Thy gladd’ning smile to meet!
[V6] 6) To see Thee face to face, Thy perfect likeness wear, And all Thy ways of wondrous grace Through endless years declare.
song.author: Edward Denny
